Hyounjun Chang

Embedded systems engineer — Linux, C, hardware projects

Welcome

I’m an embedded systems engineer working with Linux, C, and hardware. This site documents projects from my coursework and personal work.

Topics

Linux

Kernel drivers, Buildroot, QEMU, socket programming

Embedded C

System calls, circular buffers, low-level programming

Hardware

Raspberry Pi, LED matrices, SPI/DMA
